name: THUNDER ARCHER

abilities.name: Camouflaged
abilities.text: While this model is within 1" of blocking terrain, it has cover.

abilities.name: Run and Gun
abilities.text: This model's Charge action may generate (missile) actions instead of (melee) actions.

abilities.name: Runed Quiver
abilities.text: Once per activation. When determining its final duel total, this model may add one suit of its choice.

actions.name: Blessed Longbow
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or "(gun)12".

triggers.name: Strafe and Shoot
triggers.text: This model must be engaged. Move this model up to 2" and it may declare a (gun) action.

triggers.name: Fistful of Arrows
triggers.text: When resolving, deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura)2" of the target.

triggers.name: Piercing
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

triggers.name: Harvest Chi
triggers.text: After killing, gain a Chi token.

actions.name: Target Practice
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. X is equal to the distance between this model and target Scheme marker. Remove the target.

triggers.name: Inner Peace
triggers.text: This model may declare the Prepare action.

extraction_notes: Target Practice has 'TN' column value of 'X', which indicates a variable TN based on distance; stored as null per schema but noted in costs_and_restrictions
Blessed Longbow range is '*' (variable), choosing between melee and missile ranges at declaration
